rows.description: By Dr. Shortridge's Trustees one years Rent (Charges to Xtmas 1837)
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected for visual accuracy over `gpt-5-mini`, which had significant discrepancies.
rows.english_description: One year's rent received from Dr Shortridge's trustees, relating to charges up to Christmas 1837.
rows.english_description_with_amount: One year's rent received from Dr Shortridge's trustees, amounting to £220 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected for visual accuracy over `gpt-5-mini`, which had significant discrepancies and lower confidence. Visual inspection confirms amounts as 5 18 8.
rows.english_description: Interest received on the Shuttle deposit.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Interest received on the Shuttle deposit, amounting to £5 18s 8d.

rows.description: By The Receiver Interim = to Dimes to Mid 1837. 428
rows.notes: `gemini-flash`'s extraction was chosen for both description and amounts. Its note correctly observed the pounds column was empty and '428' was part of the description text, which was verified visually. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly placed '428' in the pounds column and had a significantly different description.
rows.english_description: Interim small receipt recorded by the Receiver described as 'Dimes to Mid 1837' (unclear purpose).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Interim small receipt recorded by the Receiver described as 'Dimes to Mid 1837', amounting to £0 6s 8d.

rows.description: By Do. from Office of Biblect
rows.notes: `gemini-flash`'s extraction was chosen. Visually, the amount is £1 s6 d8. `gemini-flash`'s note correctly identified a faint '7' after the pence digit but dismissed it as not a standard fraction, showing careful reasoning. `gpt-5-mini` read 16 shillings and 7 pence incorrectly and also had a less accurate description ('Whitlock' instead of 'Biblect').
rows.english_description: Receipt from the Office of Biblect transmitted by the same Receiver/officer.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from the Office of Biblect transmitted by the Receiver, amounting to £1 6s 8d.

rows.description: One fourth of improved Rent from Pickford (Norris & Swain, Due to Mich. 1834)
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected for visual accuracy over `gpt-5-mini`, which was significantly truncated and contained errors (e.g., 'Ridford' instead of 'Pickford').
rows.english_description: One-quarter share of the improved rent from Pickford, received from Norris & Swain; payment was due at Michaelmas 1834 (arrear).
rows.english_description_with_amount: One-quarter share of the improved rent from Pickford, received from Norris & Swain, amounting to £29 6s 8d.

rows.description: By Do. from Medenhain to Xtmas 1836
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected for visual accuracy, particularly 'Xtmas' which is a more accurate transcription of the abbreviation than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Mars'.
rows.english_description: Rent received from Medenhain up to Christmas 1836.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from Medenhain up to Christmas 1836, amounting to £15 13s 10d.

rows.description: By Mr. Reaton & Intintula, Mr. Snowden (fees for the Lease of his Estate)
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected for visual accuracy and completeness over `gpt-5-mini`, which contained significant uncertainties and errors.
rows.english_description: Fees received relating to the lease of Mr Snowden's estate, paid by Mr Reaton and associates (names partly unclear).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Fees received relating to the lease of Mr Snowden's estate, amounting to £5 3s 6d.

rows.description: By Mr. Day on the Library Rent (as part of Mr. Snowdon's Bill)
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected for visual accuracy and completeness, capturing specific names ('Mr. Day', 'Mr. Snowdon's Bill') where `gpt-5-mini` had uncertainties.
rows.english_description: Payment from Mr Day towards the library rent, recorded as part of Mr Snowdon's bill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from Mr Day towards the library rent (as part of Mr Snowdon's bill), amounting to £84 5s 7d.

rows.description: Reimbursement to Durned from L. Bewington (Rents - 1/2 years to XDay 1837)
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected; its transcription of 'Durned', 'L. Bewington', and 'XDay' is a better visual match to the faded script than `gpt-5-mini`'s, although both extractors noted some uncertainty in the description.
rows.english_description: Reimbursement to Durned from L. Bewington for rents covering half a year to Christmas 1837.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Reimbursement to Durned from L. Bewington for rents covering half a year to Christmas 1837, amounting to £45 0s 0d.

rows.description: By Mr. Dayman Bursar, Incrementum to Midr. 1838
rows.notes: Visual verification confirmed amounts as £840 s5 d10. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly read shillings as '6'. `gemini-flash`'s description, particularly 'Bursar', was also a more accurate visual match.
rows.english_description: Increment (increase) received through Mr Dayman the bursar, recorded to mid 1838.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Increment received through Mr Dayman the bursar to mid 1838, amounting to £840 5s 10d.

rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected; 'Biblect' is a better visual match to the script than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Billets'.
rows.english_description: Receipt from the Office of Biblect transmitted by the same (Mr Dayman the bursar).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from the Office of Biblect transmitted by Mr Dayman the bursar, amounting to £26 0s 10d.

rows.description: By Mr. Dawson Dean's Fees 1 3/4 to Midr. 1838
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` was selected; '1 3/4 to Midr. 1838' is a visually more accurate transcription than `gpt-5-mini`'s, and `gemini-flash`'s note correctly clarifies '1 3/4' as part of the descriptive text.
rows.english_description: Dean's fees received from Mr Dawson covering one and three-quarter years to mid 1838.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dean's fees received from Mr Dawson for one and three-quarter years to mid 1838, amounting to £38 17s 4d.

rows.notes: Visual verification confirmed amounts as £1755 s7 d6. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly read shillings as '4'. The description is a direct transcription of the total amount and its preceding 'L' symbol, which `gemini-flash` did not provide as literal text but implied 'Summa'.
